opportunities.ai_thesis: OXY is a compelling buy today as dual analyst upgrades from Piper Sandler and Wells Fargo on March 13th, combined with geopolitical supply disruption fears driven by Iran-Trump tensions, create a rare confluence of fundamental and technical momentum with the stock trading just 1% below its 52-week high — a breakout setup. Insider accumulation over the past 90 days and overwhelmingly bullish retail sentiment (83% on StockTwits) confirm smart money and crowd consensus are aligned ahead of a potential oil price spike. Enter now before the geopolitical premium fully prices in: if Iranian oil flows are constrained, OXY's production leverage makes it a direct beneficiary, while the analyst upgrade cycle typically attracts institutional follow-through buying within days.

POET Technologies presents a compelling entry ahead of its OFC Conference catalyst (~60 days out), where it will demonstrate next-generation hybrid laser technology targeting the high-growth AI data center interconnect market — a product launch that could validate its optical engine platform against a $1.1B market cap with meaningful upside. At $7.44 (21% below its 52-week high), the stock offers a technically attractive reset with 100% bullish retail sentiment confirming accumulation without yet being extended. Neutral insider activity removes the risk of imminent supply overhang, while the specific AI infrastructure angle — cheaper optical links for data centers — positions POET directly in front of the most durable capital spending cycle in a decade.

opportunities.ai_thesis: VERA presents a tactical entry opportunity with an FDA catalyst expected in approximately 116 days, offering a defined binary event for a stock trading 27% below its 52-week high at a $2.9B market cap that prices in meaningful risk. Muted sentiment — flat news flow and only 50% bullish retail positioning on StockTwits — suggests the market has not yet front-run the catalyst, creating an asymmetric setup before institutional positioning begins. Buy with the understanding that negative insider activity warrants a disciplined stop, making position sizing critical ahead of the FDA decision.

events.summary: Eaton, an industrial equipment manufacturer, is showing strong technical setups as industrials sector outpaces tech in early 2026.
